title: QURECA, EdenBase and QCentroid have announced a partnership as part of EdenBase's QBase ecosystem initiative - Qureca
why:
- QURECA, EdenBase, and QCentroid have partnered to deliver executive-level quantum training as part of EdenBase’s QBase ecosystem initiative.
- The program aims to equip senior decision-makers in sectors such as finance, energy, defence, government, and healthcare with a strategic understanding of quantum technologies and their impact.
- Training will include comprehensive four-hour in-person workshops at QBase, a dedicated quantum applications hub in the City of London, in partnership with Northeastern University London.
- QCentroid’s QuantumOps platform will enable practical, hands-on exploration and development of sector-specific quantum use cases without requiring deep technical skills.
- The initiative is positioned to accelerate real-world adoption of quantum technologies by moving beyond theory to repeatable practice within organizations.
